1201                 cur.execute(
1202                     f"""
1203                     WITH ranked AS (
1204                         SELECT
1205                             rb.problem_id,
1206                             rb.confidence_last,
1207                             rb.next_review_at,
1208                             rb.first_solved_at,
1209                             rb.last_reviewed_at,
1210                             rb.review_count,
1211                             lp.title,
1212                             lp.title_slug,
1213                             lp.difficulty,
1214                             lp.topics,
1215                             EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rb.next_review_at - NOW()))
1216                                 / 86400.0                          AS days_remaining,
1217                             COUNT(*) OVER ()                       AS total_count
1218                         FROM revision_bank rb
1219                         JOIN leetcode_problems lp
1220                           ON lp.question_id = rb.problem_id
1221                         {where_clause}
1222                         {order_clause}
1223                     )
1224                     SELECT * FROM ranked
1225                     LIMIT  %(limit)s
1226                     OFFSET %(offset)s
1227                     """,
1228                     {"user_id": user_id, "limit": limit, "offset": offset},
